atlas v0.5
Back To Movements

Historical Movement

Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

高饱和霓虹、黑夜城市、技术感界面、世界观驱动。它更像视觉文化分支。

Period

1980s-present

Origin

Science fiction / game and tech culture

Why It Matters

今天的游戏、硬件、沉浸式产品页和一些 AI / tech brand，会借这种未来主义张力来强化世界观。

Core Traits

先理解这条语言本身

Principles

  • neon-on-dark contrast
  • worldbuilding first
  • screen-like overlays
  • high-energy tech atmosphere

Watchouts

  • 容易只剩颜色和发光
  • 不适合需要安静阅读或严肃知识感的页面

Sample Gallery

历史语言在今天的网页里如何现身

Descendant Families

今天在网页里更接近哪些家族

Web Family

Neon Techno-Futurist Interface

Dark-ground, neon-accent, worldbuilding-first pages that feel closer to game, hardware, or future-tech launch surfaces than to standard product pages.

Historical Roots

Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Best For

gaminghardware launchesimmersive tech brands
Open family
Web Family

Stage-Driven Showcase

A hero or first fold behaves like a stage. One image, scene, or world carries the page before the rest of the content unfolds.

Historical Roots

Art Deco / Streamlined LuxuryCyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

Best For

campaignsflagship launchesfilm and entertainment
Open family

Reference Links

继续读历史和看案例

  • Britannica: Cyberpunk
  • Cyberpunk
